text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 15. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
